assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with a table listing both 'trustify-backend' (serena_backend) and 'trustify-ui' (serena_ui) as entries
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 3-8: '## Repository Registry' heading followed by a table with rows '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' and '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 10-16: '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: '- Project key: TC', '- Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', '- Feature issue type ID: 10142', '- Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', '- GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that documents the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 19-20: '## Code Intelligence' heading followed by 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' Also includes an example using mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol on lines 25-29.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 31: '### Limitations' subheading appears under '## Code Intelligence' (line 19), with content 'No limitations known -- no Serena instances reported limitations.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 9-14: '## Step 2 -- Discover Serena Instances' section states 'Discovery method: Scanned tool names for the `mcp__<instance>__<tool>` naming pattern' and lists 'Discovered instances: serena_backend' and 'serena_ui' with their respective MCP tools.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all Project Configuration sections (Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, Bug Configuration) were newly added -- pre-existing non-configuration content from the CLAUDE.md (like the project heading and Documentation section) may appear as preserved, which is expected since only Project Configuration was missing
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md line 5: 'The existing CLAUDE.md had no `# Project Configuration` section. All configuration sections were added new.' All sections marked '(new)': '## Repository Registry (new)' (line 14), '## Jira Configuration (new)' (line 22), '## Code Intelligence (new)' (line 31), '## Bug Configuration (new)' (line 38). Lines 50-56 show preserved content: '# my-project heading', '## Documentation section', '## Getting Started section'.

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path -- matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 5: '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' -- exact column headers match the required structure.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 35-39: '## Bug Configuration' section with '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'

assertion_results.text: The skill offers to enable security triage for the project (Step 9 opt-in prompt) and respects the user's decline -- outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section (full file is 44 lines, sections are: Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, Limitations, Bug Configuration, Hierarchy Configuration). changes-log.md line 61 confirms: 'Security Configuration -- User declined to enable security triage'. discovery-log.md lines 55-56: 'User declined to enable security triage for this project / Section not created'.
